codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior failure by adding `await coordinator.endLaunch(..., success: false)` to every failure return path inside both `launchChrome` and `launchSafari`, while preserving existing success-path cleanup. Reviewing both diffs confirms the original cleanup-race fix removed deferred cleanup but left these nested failures uncovered, and this follow-up closes that gap.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker marked `skillFeedback.followedProcedure` as true, but transcript evidence still does not show required context reads from the switcher-core-worker procedure (`mission AGENTS.md`, `.factory/library/architecture.md`, `.factory/library/user-testing.md`) or the required context-read evidence in verification commands.

Handoff verification.commandsRun only contains xcodebuild test.

summary: Reviewed the fix transcript skeleton and both relevant diffs (`f47b581c...` and `c6736fa4...`). The new commit correctly adds endLaunch cleanup on all previously missing browser-launch failure paths, eliminating the stale pending-state condition identified in the prior failed review.
